content.en:
Taboo oddly.

Ye Tian stepped forward step by step.

Airplanes!!!!

Time and space reversed, and Ye Tian stepped on a black land.

The land here is not ordinary, and it contains a strange power, as if it wants to swallow him up.

"The soil that can devour life, if such a place is a birth resource, it is definitely a very precious resource!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Swish!

He was wandering around tabooly, looking for resources, and if he could find some resources to take out, it would be very good.

But soon, he was targeted by the most curious objects located here.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying aura descended, and everything was imprisoned.

And Ye Tian was the same, unable to move.

Tear and pull!

The void cracked, and a black strange figure appeared, with a black stone above his head, and that black stone was the body of the most strange thing.

Wow!

A black glow swept in.

Ye Tian's body was streaked by black light, and began to crumble like a broken piece of mud.

......

"What a terrifying Dao Strange Thing, my true body copy body now also has the top sevenfold Dao realm combat power, but he was still killed in seconds, and the sixth sequence of the Dao rules is really powerful!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In a short period of time, he will not go to the first strange place and taboo strange place, and if he goes, he will only send him to death, which is meaningless.

When his cultivation breaks through to the fivefold Dao realm, he may be able to try.

However, after reaching the Quadruple Dao Realm, it was even more difficult for his cultivation to improve, and it would take a long time to advance from the early stage of the Quadruple Dao Realm to the middle stage, and if he used the resources in his hand to cultivate, it would take at least 10,000 years to have any hope of breaking through to the middle of the Quadruple Dao Realm.

This is also normal, like many one-level Dao realms to ascend to a small realm, it may take hundreds of thousands of Dao era years.

Those six or seven to the Dao realm, to ascend to a small realm, which is not based on millions or even tens of millions of years to the Dao era?

Therefore, just 10,000 Dao Era can improve the strength by a small realm, which is already very fast.

However, Ye Tian's cultivation speed has been very fast along the way, and he doesn't want to improve so slowly.

"It's a pity that those Supreme Dao Void Demons don't dare to come in, otherwise I would be able to use the Killing Supreme Dao Void Demons to earn the Heaven and Earth Origin Gift. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Suddenly.

He thought of another way, there was no Supreme Dao Void Demon in this third-level battlefield in the Infinite Domain, could he go to the battlefield of his Innate Origin Domain, help them, and kill the Supreme Dao Void Demon in other battlefields?

If he could, he might be able to earn the Heaven and Earth Origin Gifts of other Innate Origin Domains!

Swish!

Ye Tian came to the palace of the Taisu Palace Master and came to find the Taisu Palace Master.

Now, the Xuantian Alliance controls the Wuji Domain, and the Taisu Palace Lord, as the Palace Master of the Taisu Palace and the Alliance Master of the Xuantian Alliance, she has a way to contact the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and naturally she can also arrange for him to go to other Innate Origin Domains.

Soon.

Ye Tian met the Taisu Palace Master.

However, the Taisu Palace Master was in retreat and cultivating, and what came out was only an incarnation.

"Ye Tian, are you looking for anything from me?"

The Taisu Palace Lord asked.

Ye Tian hurriedly asked, "Taisu Palace Master, can you arrange for me to go to other Innate Origin Domain battlefields?"

"Other battlefields????" The Taisu Palace Master was a little puzzled, he didn't want to go to the battlefield in any Dao realm, but Ye Tian wanted to go to other battlefields?

Ye Tian explained: "Killing the Supreme Dao Void Demon can obtain the gift of Heaven and Earth Origin, so I want to kill more Supreme Dao Void Demons so that they can be used to improve their cultivation." Now, my cultivation speed is too slow, and if I continue to cultivate step by step, I don't know when I will be able to break through to the Fifth Rank Dao Realm!"

The corners of the Taisu Palace Master's mouth twitched, Ye Tian's cultivation speed was still slow?

It's just too fast, it's so fast that she can't even imagine it.

Moreover, she was sure that Ye Tian had definitely collected a lot of resources in a few strange places, and her wealth was not even comparable to her.

Those resources were enough to make Ye Tian's cultivation skyrocket rapidly, but Ye Tian actually disliked slowness.

However, if Ye Tian wants to go to other battlefields, that is also a good thing.

Recently, there is no Supreme Dao Void Demon in the battlefield of the True Dao Domain, the other battlefields are tight, and the Innate Origin Domain Alliance is already blaming the Infinite Domain, if Ye Tian is sent over to support other battlefields, it may be possible to make the Innate Origin Domain Alliance less troublesome in the Infinite Domain.

"Ye Tian, I'll communicate and see which third-level battlefield is under a lot of pressure. Taisu Palace Master said.

"Okay, then thank you Taisu Palace Master!"

Ye Tian retreated.

After going back, he silently waited for news from the Taisu Palace Master.

About ten years later, the Taisu Palace Lord replied.

"Ye Tian, there is a battlefield where the Innate Origin Domain is located nearby is under great pressure, after I contacted it, I told you about your situation, and the other party is willing to let you go over and give you a battlefield order, so that you can go in and kill those Supreme Dao Void Demons. "

"However, I don't know about the situation of that third-level battlefield, and they didn't elaborate. "

Taisu Palace main road.

"It's a third-level battlefield!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

......

Innate Origin Domain - Heavenly Dragon Domain.

This Innate Origin Domain is about three times larger than the Infinite Domain, and its strength is also much stronger.

The Heavenly Dragon Domain has a total of three Eightfold Supreme Dao Realms, while the Infinite Domain only has one.

And the Sevenfold Dao Realm of the Heavenly Dragon Domain is also about five times that of the Infinite Domain.

But even so, in the face of the invasion of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, the Heavenly Dragon Domain also seemed to be very weak.

this day.

Ye Tian used the Innate Origin Domain Boundary Gate of the Infinite Domain to shuttle to the Winter Night Fortress, and then came to the Heavenly Dragon Domain through the Winter Night Fortress.

The fortress is not only a supreme void demon in the void realm, but also plays the role of teleportation.

It is precisely because of this that the Luohe Fortress has been breached, and some of the Innate Origin Domains cannot communicate with each other, which makes the Innate Origin Domain Alliance so angry and the losses are so huge.

Celestial Dragon Domain.

Celestial Dragon City.

Ye Tian came here through the Winter Night Fortress, and then after a series of inspections, he obtained permission to operate in the Heavenly Dragon Domain.

Subsequently, Ye Tian, under the leadership of a sevenfold supreme Dao realm, went to handle the battlefield order.

And this Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm is the Ao Xun Dragon Venerable of the Heavenly Dragon Domain Heavenly Dragon Divine Mountain, and his body is a nine-headed primeval golden dragon.

"Ao Xun Dragon Venerable, how is the situation of the third-level battlefield in your Heavenly Dragon Domain, can you tell me one or two?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Ao Xun Longzun began to talk about this battlefield, "This battlefield in our Heavenly Dragon Domain is called the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, the reason why it is called this name is that we are fighting against the Heavenly Blood Clan of the Supreme Dao Void Demon Clan, and the Heavenly Blood Battlefield is very cruel, ranking in the top fifty among the thousands of third-level battlefields under the command of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance. Therefore, we can't bear it in the Heavenly Dragon Domain, and we often need to ask for help. "
